Call down a Meepteor on the target that deals () magic damage.

Meep Bonus: An additional () mini Meepteor are called down on nearby targets dealing () magic damage each.

name: Vex
description:
Passive: Every time Vex attacks, Shadow strikes a nearby enemy, dealing () magic damage. Whenever an enemy is struck times by Shadow, Shadow strikes them again.

Active: Shadow launches empowered strikes, dealing () magic damage instead.

ability.name: Lend Me a Hand, Shadow!
ability.description:
Passive: Every time Vex attacks, Shadow strikes a nearby enemy, dealing () magic damage. Whenever an enemy is struck times by Shadow, Shadow strikes them again.

Active: Shadow launches empowered strikes, dealing () magic damage instead.

name: Viktor
description: Channel a one-hex psionic storm that follows enemies for seconds. Each second, it grows larger and deals () magic damage to enemies within, reduced by per hex from the epicenter.

ability.name: Psionic Storm
ability.description: Channel a one-hex psionic storm that follows enemies for seconds. Each second, it grows larger and deals () magic damage to enemies within, reduced by per hex from the epicenter.

name: Xayah
description:
Passive: Attacks bounce to strike times, dealing reduced damage per target hit and leaving a Feather behind the final target.

Active: Gain Attack Speed for the next attacks. At the end, recall all Feathers split between the closest enemies, dealing () physical damage each. Xayah's current target takes () additional physical damage per feather.

ability.name: Stellar Ricochet

Active: Gain Attack Speed for the next attacks. At the end, recall all Feathers split between the closest enemies, dealing () physical damage each. Xayah's current target takes () additional physical damage per feather.

name: Zed
description: Create a clone behind the target with reduced max Health and increased Mana cost. The clone inherits its creator's items, stats, and current Health, and can cast Quantum Clone.

ability.name: Quantum Clone
ability.description: Create a clone behind the target with reduced max Health and increased Mana cost. The clone inherits its creator's items, stats, and current Health, and can cast Quantum Clone.

name: Zoe
description: Fire a paddle star at the current target, dealing () magic damage to the first target hit and () to others it passes through. When the missile reaches its destination, redirect it to a distant enemy, increasing its speed and repeating the damage. This redirect can occur times.
